name: golang-github-go-playground-locales-dev
title: golang-github-go-playground-locales-dev
summary: set of locales generated from the CLDR Project
description:
set of locales generated from the CLDR Project
This set of locales was generated from the CLDR Project, and can be
used independently or within an i18n package; the primary target is
supplementing go-playground's universal-translator.
.
Features:
- Rules generated from CLDR data v36.1
- Contains Cardinal, Ordinal and Range Plural Rules
- Contains Month, Weekday and Timezone translations
- Contains Date & Time formatting functions
- Contains Number, Currency, Accounting and Percent formatting
functions
- Supports the Gregorian calendar only
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-go-playground-locales-dev because set of locales generated from the CLDR Project.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-go-playground-locales-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-go-playground-locales-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-go-playground-locales-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
